predicates.name: has_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person possesses Belgian nationality (can provide proof thereof).

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is a foreigner (vreemdeling): does not prove Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_eu_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union, as may be directly stated in a case.

predicates.name: falls_under_eu_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person falls under EU law on free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not an EU citizen and not covered by EU free movement law.

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
predicates.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: in_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without meeting entry or residence conditions.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the responsible member state for an international protection request.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: There is a risk of absconding (risico op onderduiken) for the person, established after individual examination on the basis of objective criteria.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding is current and real for the person.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person.

predicates.name: holds_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person holds a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_home_authority
predicates.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer directly.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is an identified foreigner (geïdentificeerde vreemdeling) under one of the three identification criteria.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not submit an international protection request within the legally prescribed period.

predicates.name: used_false_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a protection, residence, removal, or pushback procedure.

predicates.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement of regulations on entry, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, removal measure, entry ban, less coercive measure, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in Belgium and/or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: filed_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person filed a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refusal of entry or residence, end of stay, pushback, or removal measure.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: When questioned on this point, the person concealed that they had previously given fingerprints in another state bound by EU rules on determining the responsible state for an international protection request.

predicates.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in Belgium or other member states that resulted in negative decisions or did not lead to a residence permit.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_protection_request_in_other_state
predicates.description: When questioned on this point, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by EU rules on determining the responsible state.

predicates.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application
predicates.description: The person declared or their file shows that they came to Belgium for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection request or residence application.

predicates.name: fined_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal
predicates.description: The person has been fined for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective criteria for risk of absconding is met for the person.
